name: Tuna and Green Chilies
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the tuna and the first 7 ingredients in a bowl.
2. Spread half of the mixture on half of the bread slices to make sandwiches.
3. Arrange each sandwich in quarters, placing cheese between layers and on top.
4. In another bowl, combine the remaining ingredients (milk, cream, eggs) and pour over all the sandwiches.
5. Spray a square baking dish with cooking spray.
6. Place the layered sandwiches in the dish, covering them completely with the mixture.
7. Bake at 300°F for 50 minutes or until set.
Tootie Notes: You don't need to add anything but a nice spinach salad and eat.
